title: hieracium triangulare subsp. lacerifolium
intro: Hieracium triangulare subsp. lacerifolium, also known as a lesser hawk's-beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like flowering plants in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium triangulare subsp. lacerifolium are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help to protect against oxidative stress and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Hieracium triangulare subsp. lacerifolium is typically used as a tea or tincture, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
